docs.title: Payroll Solution API Documentation
docs.text:
Documentation of APIs for the Simplified Payroll Solution.

Version: v 1.0.1

docs.title: Base URL (For Development)
docs.text:
https://kratest.pesaflow.com:30000/api/

Caveat: employer_tax_payer_id and organization_id are used interchangeably, depending on whether the authenticated user is an organization or individual. This will usually be an individual.

docs.title: Setup: Authentication
docs.text:
All API requests require authentication. Include the authentication token in the request header:

Authorization: Bearer {your_token}

The Postman Token Generation API Collection is included Token Generation API to get the authentication token.

Token Validity: 15 minutes.

docs.title: 1.0 Validate employee details
docs.text:
Validate employee details before adding. Endpoint: GET payroll/employee/personal-details/validate

Query params:

{
  "pin": "A01*******Z",
  "gui": "107*****6",
  "type": "citizen",
  "first_name": "George",
  "employer_tax_payer_id": "21128", 
  "tax_payer_pin": "A0******09L"
}

Success response:

{
  "dob":"1968-01-01",
  "gender":"M",
  "gui":"107*****6",
  "name":"GEORGE KIRIMI MURITHI",
  "pin":"A0*******43Z",
  "type":"citizen"
}

Error responses:

  • Invalid ID - ID does not match the PIN.
  • Name mismatch - Name submitted does not match the records.
  • Employee exists - Employee exists.

docs.title: 1.1 Add Single Employee
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/employee

Create a new employee record in the payroll system.

Request Body: - As elaborated in Employee Payload Docs

Response: Status Code: 201 (Created)

{"message":"Employee added"}

docs.title: 1.2 Add Bulk Employees
docs.text: Endpoint: POST /payroll/employee/upload-employees As defined in Employee Upload.md

docs.title: 1.3 Edit Employee
docs.text:
Get a single employee: GET /payroll/employee/:uuid

Edit employee: POST /payroll/employee/:uuid/update

Update an existing employee's information.

Path Parameters: - uuid - Employee unique identifier

Request Body: Similar to employee payload in Employee Payload Docs.md

Response: Response string "employee updated".

docs.title: 1.4 Deactivate Employee
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/employee/:uuid/toggle-status

Toggle employee status (active/inactive).

Path Parameters: - uuid - Employee unique identifier

Request Body:

{"status":false,"deactivation_reason":"Go on break"}

Response:

Response string: "employee updated"

docs.title: 1.5 Activate Employee
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/employee/:uuid/toggle-status

Toggle employee status (active/inactive).

Path Parameters: - uuid - Employee unique identifier

Request Body:

{"status":true,"deactivation_reason":""}

Response:

Response string: "employee updated"

docs.title: 1.6 Terminate Employee
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/employee/:uuid/remove

Toggle employee status (active/inactive).

Path Parameters: - uuid - Employee unique identifier

Request Body:

{"termination_reason":"End of contract","termination_date":"2025-12-04T04:32:00.000Z"}

Response:

Response string: "employee removed"

docs.title: 1.7 Reinstate Employee
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/employee/:uuid/reinstate

Reinstate a previously terminated employee.

Path Parameters: - uuid - Employee unique identifier

Request Body:

{"new_employment_no":"SAMPLEEMP220"} // optional

Response:

Response string: "employee reinstated"

docs.title: List All Employees
docs.text:
Endpoint: GET /payroll/employee

Query Parameters: - page - Page number (default: 1) - page_size - Results per page (default: 20) - status - Filter by status (active/inactive) - multi_filter - Search by name or PIN - contract_type - Array of contract types. ['permanent', 'fixed-term', consultant, ...]

docs.title: Get Single Employee
docs.text:
Endpoint: GET /payroll/employee/:uuid

Path Parameters: - uuid - Employee unique identifier

docs.title: 2.1 Process Regular Payroll
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll

Initiate a new payroll processing cycle for employees or consultants, based on payroll_type and contract_type fields.

Request Body:

{
  "period":"2025-09-30",
  "employer_tax_payer_id":"21128", // or organization_id of authenticated user
  "contract_type":["permanent","contract","internship","fixed-term","casual"], // or ['consultant']
  "payroll_type":"regular" // or 'consultants'
}

Response:

{"ref_no":"PR-HALLHV"}

docs.title: 2.1.1 Upload Payroll File
docs.text: As outlined in Payroll Upload file

docs.title: 2.1.2 Fetch payroll
docs.text:
Endpoint: GET /payroll/:ref_no? Fetch the created payroll.

Path Parameters: - ref_no - Payroll reference number

Request Body:

{
  "payroll_ref_no" : "PR-HALLHV",
  "page": "1",
  "page_size": "10"
}

Response: Documented in Payroll Payload.md

docs.title: 2.4 Update Payroll
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/:ref_no/update

Update payroll. Mainly used to submit payroll to a 'Pending Filing' state.

Path Parameters: - ref_no - Payroll reference number

Request body:

{"status":"pending_filing"}

docs.title: List Payrolls
docs.text:
Endpoint: GET /payroll

Query Parameters: - page, page_size, status, period, payroll_type

docs.title: Get Single Payroll
docs.text: Endpoint: GET /payroll/:ref_no

docs.title: Payroll Statistics
docs.text: Endpoint: GET /payroll/stats

docs.title: Get Available Periods
docs.text:
Endpoint: GET /payroll/get-periods

Query params: - employer_tax_payer_id - ID of authenticated user, if individual. - organization_id - ID of authenticated user, if organization.

docs.title: Get System Constants
docs.text:
Endpoint: GET /payroll/get-constants

Returns defined payroll constants.

docs.title: 3.1 Download Payslip
docs.text:
Endpoint: GET /payroll/employee/download-payslip/:ref_no

Download individual employee payslip or voucher for consultants.

Path Parameters: - ref_no - Payroll item reference number

Response: PDF file

docs.title: 3.2 Send Payslips
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/:ref_no/send-payslips

Send payslips to all employees via email.

Path Parameters: - ref_no - Payroll reference number

docs.title: 3.3 Send Single Payslip
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/:ref_no/send-one-payslip

Send payslip to a specific employee.

Request Body:

{
  "employee_uuid": "string",
  "email": "employee@example.com"
}

docs.title: 4.1 Filing PAYE
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/:ref_no/file-return

File PAYE return to KRA iTax system.

Path Parameters: - ref_no - Payroll reference number

Request Body: None.

Success Response:

{
  "message": "Return filed successfully with Ack. No."
}

Error Response:

{
  "errors": [
    "Return cannot be filed for this period",
    "Taxable amount for taxpayer with pin A000000000001 cannot be less than 20000",
    ...
  ]
}

docs.title: 4.2 Filing WHT
docs.text: In development.

docs.title: 4.3 Update PAYE Token
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/update-paye-token

Update iTax authentication token.

Request Body:

{
  "token": "new_itax_token",
  "expires_at": "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z"
}

docs.title: Generate Payment
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/make-payment

Generate payment for AHL or NITA. To make PAYE payments, access the liabilities endpoint.

Request Body:

{"ref_no":"PR-BEINRE","type":"AHL"}

Sample body:

{
    "inserted_at": "2025-12-02T05:18:08",
    "payment": {
        "tax_return": null,
        "amount_paid": "0",
        "items": [
            {
                "account_id": 194207,
                "amount_expected": null,
                "desc": "3306",
                "id": "908dd73f-17dd-46b6-a034-a7cf0cd755a1",
                "item_ref": "ITM-MTSL",
                "price": "37500.0",
                "quantity": "1.0",
                "require_settlement": true,
                "settlements": {
                    "account_number": "194207",
                    "desc": "Affordable Housing Levy",
                    "id": "2dd1d26a-6fa1-4b47-a9b0-4f426cb5e7f5",
                    "value": "37500.0"
                }
            }
        ],
        "status": "pending",
        "period": "01/12/2025 - 31/12/2025",
        "transacted_by": null,
        "metadata": {},
        ...,
        "payment_date": "02/12/2025",
        "ref_no": "2020250002604798", // use the ref_no to view and pay for the payment
        "transacted_by_id": null
    },
    "payment_id": 9570,
    "payroll": null,
    "payroll_id": 339,
    "status": "active",
    "type": "AHL",
    "updated_at": "2025-12-02T05:18:08"
}

Use the payment.ref_no to access and make settlements for the payment.

docs.title: Support
docs.text: For technical support or questions: - Email: elisha.mbadi@valuechainfactory.com

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
This document explains the payload structure for adding an employee to the payroll system.

The payload json is found in Employee Payload JSON

docs.title: Core Employee Information
docs.text: Field Type Required Description name string Yes Full name of the employee pin string Yes KRA PIN number nssf_no string No NSSF registration number msisdn string No Employee phone number type string Yes Employee type. Options: "citizen", "resident", "non-resident" primary_employee boolean Yes Whether this is a primary employee record contract_type string Yes Options: "permanent", "fixed-term", "contract", "casual", "consultant" date_of_employment string (ISO 8601) Yes Employee start date date_of_completion string (ISO 8601) No Contract end date (required for fixed-term contracts)

docs.title: Salary
docs.text: Field Type Required Description salary number Yes Basic salary amount income array Yes Array of income items (see below)

docs.title: Income Items
docs.text:
Each income item in the array contains:

Field Type Required Options/Description type string Yes Options: "salary", "allowance" subtype string Yes Options: "basic-salary", "housing-allowance", "transport-allowance", "leave-pay", "overtime-allowance", "directors-fee", "other-cash-benefits", "other-allowance" amount number Yes Amount for this income item metadata object No Additional data specific to the income type

docs.title: Benefits
docs.text: Field Type Required Description benefits array No Array of benefit items

docs.title: Benefit Items
docs.text: Field Type Required Options/Description type string Yes Must be "benefit" subtype string Yes Options: "car-benefit", "housing-benefit", "other-benefit" amount number Yes Benefit value amount metadata object Yes Required metadata varies by subtype

docs.title: Car Benefit Metadata
docs.text: Field Required Options type Yes "owned", "hired" body_type Yes "saloon", "station-wagon", "pickup", "van", etc. cc_rating Yes Engine CC (e.g., "1500", "3000") ownership_cost No Cost if owned hiring_cost No Monthly cost if hired

docs.title: Housing Benefit Metadata
docs.text: Field Required Options type Yes "employer_rented", "employer_owned", "employee_owned"

docs.title: Other Benefit Metadata
docs.text: Field Required Description meal_benefit No Meal benefit amount non_cash_benefit No Non-cash benefit amount other_taxable_benefit No Other taxable benefits

docs.title: Pensions
docs.text:
Field Type Required Description pensions array No Registered pension schemes

Each pension item:

Field Required Description name Yes Pension scheme name scheme_id Yes Scheme registration ID amount Yes Monthly contribution amount type Yes Must be "pension"

docs.title: PRMFs (Provident Funds)
docs.text:
Field Type Required Description prmfs array No Provident fund contributions

Each PRMF item:

Field Required Description name Yes Fund name scheme_id Yes Scheme registration ID amount Yes Monthly contribution amount type Yes Must be "PRMF"

docs.title: Mortgages
docs.text:
Field Type Required Description mortgages array No Mortgage interest relief

Each mortgage item:

Field Required Description name Yes Lender name account_number Yes Mortgage account number amount Yes Monthly interest amount start_date Yes Mortgage start date (ISO 8601) end_date Yes Mortgage end date (ISO 8601) type Yes Must be "mortgage-interest"

docs.title: Insurances
docs.text:
Field Type Required Description insurances array No Health/life insurance for relief

Each insurance item should include premium amounts eligible for tax relief.

docs.title: Metadata
docs.text: Field Type Required Description metadata.bank_name string No Employee's bank name metadata.bank_code string No Bank code metadata.bank_account_number string No Account number metadata.disability_tax_exempt boolean No Whether employee qualifies for disability exemption metadata.disability_tax_exemption_no string No Exemption certificate number metadata.nita_registered boolean No NITA registration status

docs.title: Authentication
docs.text: Field Type Required Description employer_type string Yes organization or individual organization_id string Yes ID of currently authenticated organization employer_tax_payer_id string Yes ID of currently authenticated individual

docs.title: Calculated Fields
docs.text:
These fields are computed by the system and should not be provided in the input:

  • gross_pay
  • taxable_pay
  • tax_due
  • net_pay
  • relief
  • deduction
  • allowance
  • benefit
  • items (detailed breakdown)

docs.title: File Upload Process
docs.text:
1. Download the file template

Download Template: - GET /payroll/employee/view-template/:name

Sample endpoint: GET /payroll/employee/view-template/Employee%20Upload%20Template.xlsx

  1. Upload the filled file

Endpoint: POST /payroll/employee/upload-employees

Query Parameters:

Parameter Required Description type Yes Always "employees" organization_id Conditional Required if employer is an organization employer_tax_payer_id Conditional Required if employer is an individual

Request Body: - FormData containing the Excel file in the attachment field. Max size 10 MB.

Response: - Returns array of parsed employee objects with validation results - Each employee includes hasError and isDuplicate flags if validation fails - Sample

[   
    {
        "basic_salary": "60000",
        "contract_type": "fixed-term",
        "date_of_completion": "t34t34tfr",
        "date_of_employment": "t34t34tfr",
        "dob": "2001-06-11",
        "email": "",
        "employer_tax_payer_id": "21128", // or organization_id
        "employment_no": "",
        "errors": {
            "date_of_completion": "Invalid format. Use YYYY-MM-DD",
            "date_of_employment": "Invalid format. Use YYYY-MM-DD"
        },
        "gender": "M",
        "gui": "30**********35",
        "housing_allowance": "0",
        "items": [
            {
                "amount": "60000",
                "subtype": "basic-salary",
                "type": "salary"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "subtype": "housing-allowance",
                "type": "allowance"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "subtype": "transport-allowance",
                "type": "allowance"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "subtype": "leave-pay",
                "type": "salary"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "subtype": "overtime-allowance",
                "type": "allowance"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "subtype": "directors-fee",
                "type": "allowance"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "subtype": "lump-sum-payment",
                "type": "allowance"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "metadata": {},
                "subtype": "other-allowance",
                "type": "allowance"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "metadata": {
                    "hiring_cost": "0",
                    "ownership_cost": "0"
                },
                "subtype": "car-benefit",
                "type": "benefit"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "metadata": {
                    "rent_recovered": "0"
                },
                "subtype": "housing-benefit",
                "type": "benefit"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "metadata": {},
                "subtype": "other-benefit",
                "type": "benefit"
            },
            {
                "amount": "0",
                "currency": "KES",
                "subtype": "tax-relief",
                "type": "relief"
            }
        ],
        "msisdn": "25********55",
        "name": "TEST USER",
        "no": "1",
        "nssf_no": "6788778",
        "organization_id": "",
        "pin": "A0*********L",
        "primary_employee": "yes",
        "shif_no": "895570",
        "transport_allowance": "0",
        "type": "citizen"
    },
    ... // more employees
]

Notes: - File must be a valid Excel format - Use the provided sample file template for correct formatting

docs.title: Bulk Employee Creation
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll/employee

Parameters:

Parameter Type Description partial boolean If true, only uploads employees without errors. If false, attempts to upload all employees

Request Body:

{
  "employees": [...], // same structure as the payload in Step 2 above
  "employer_type": "organization" | "individual",
  "employer_tax_payer_id": 124234 // or organization_id
}

Employee Processing: - Partial parameter allows to upload employees who have no validation errors.

Validation: - Fails if no employees in upload - Fails if all employees have errors (when using partial upload)

Post-Upload Behavior: - Returns success message if all employees added: "All employees onboarded successfully"

docs.title: Overview
docs.text: Retrieves detailed payroll information for a specific payroll period, including employee-level breakdowns, tax calculations, and aggregated totals.

docs.title: Top-Level Fields
docs.text: Field Type Description id integer Unique payroll identifier ref_no string Payroll reference number (e.g., "PR-HALLHV") period string Payroll period date (ISO 8601 format) status string Payroll status (draft, active, etc.) type string Payroll type (e.g., regular) currency string Currency code (e.g., "KES") total_employees integer Total number of employees in payroll gross_pay string Total gross pay for all employees net_pay string Total net pay for all employees gross_tax_due string Total gross tax due before reliefs net_tax_due string Total net tax due after reliefs filing_date string/null Date payroll was filed with authorities payment_date string/null Date employees were paid employer_tax_payer_id integer Individual employer's ID organization_id integer Organization employer's ID inserted_at string Record creation timestamp updated_at string Record last update timestamp

docs.title: Payroll Items Array
docs.text:
Contains detailed information for each employee in the payroll.

Field Type Description id integer Unique payroll item identifier employee_id integer Employee identifier name string Employee full name pin string Employee tax PIN ref_no string Employee payroll reference salary string Base salary amount allowance string Total allowances benefit string Total taxable benefits deduction string Total deductions relief string Total tax reliefs gross_pay string Employee gross pay net_pay string Employee net pay taxable_pay string Total taxable income tax_due string Total tax payable status string Item status primary_employee boolean Whether this is a primary employee record nita_registered boolean NITA registration status email_sent boolean Whether payslip email was sent

docs.title: Items Array (Nested in Payroll Items)
docs.text:
Detailed breakdown of salary components, benefits, deductions, and reliefs for each employee.

Common Fields:

  • id (string): Unique item identifier (UUID)
  • amount (string): Item amount
  • currency (string): Currency code
  • type (string): Category (salary, allowance, benefit, deduction, relief, employer, exemption, allowable-deduction)
  • subtype (string): Specific item type (e.g., basic-salary, PAYE, NSSF, housing-benefit)
  • status (string): Item status
  • metadata (object): Additional context-specific information

Common Subtypes by Type:

Salary: basic-salary, leave-pay

Allowance: housing-allowance, transport-allowance, overtime-allowance, directors-fee, leave-pay, other-cash-benefits, other-allowance

Benefit: housing-benefit, car-benefit, other-benefit

Deduction: PAYE, NSSF, SHIF, AHL, NITA, other, FBT

Relief: tax-relief, insurance-relief

Allowable Deduction: pension, PRMF, mortgage-interest, meal_benefit, non_cash_benefit

Employer: NSSF, AHL, NITA, FBT

Exemption: disability-exemption

docs.title: Tax Aggregates Array
docs.text:
Summarized totals for each tax component across all employees.

Field Type Description id string Unique aggregate identifier (UUID) type string Component category subtype string Specific component type amount string Total amount for this component currency string Currency code quantity integer Number of employees with this component

docs.title: File Upload Process
docs.text:
1. Download the file template

Download Template: - GET /payroll/employee/view-template/:name

Sample endpoint: GET /payroll/employee/view-template/Payroll%20Quick%20Upload%20Template.xlsx

  1. Upload the filled file

Endpoint: POST /payroll/employee/upload-employees

Query Parameters:

Parameter Required Description type Yes Always "quick_upload" organization_id Conditional Required if employer is an organization employer_tax_payer_id Conditional Required if employer is an individual

Request Body: - FormData containing the Excel file in the attachment field. Max size 10 MB.

Response: - Returns array of parsed payroll items with validation results - Each employee includes hasError and isDuplicate flags if validation fails - Sample

[

docs.title: Bulk Payroll Items Creation
docs.text:
Endpoint: POST /payroll

Request Body:

{
  "employees": [...], // same structure as the payload in Step 2 above
  "employer_type": "organization" | "individual",
  "employer_tax_payer_id": 234,
  "payroll_type": "regular", // or 'consultants'
  "period": "2025-12-31", // last day of that month
  "status": "pending_filing"
}

Response body:

{"ref_no":"PR-LKHCMH"} // ref_no of created payroll

docs.title: Export Reports
docs.text:
Export various payroll reports in different formats.

Endpoint: POST /payroll/export-reports

Content-Type: application/json

docs.title: Request Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Type Required Description report_type string Yes Type of report to export (see available types below) period string Yes Last date of month period (e.g., "2024-01-31", "2024-09-30") payroll_ref_no string Yes Payroll reference number

docs.title: Tax Reports
docs.text:
• p10 - P10 Tax Report
  • fringe_benefit - Fringe Benefit Report

docs.title: Payroll Reports
docs.text:
• payroll_details - Payroll Muster Roll Report
  • payroll_shif_report - SHIF Report
  • payroll_housing_levy_report - AHL Report
  • payroll_nssf_report - NSSF Report

docs.title: Success Response
docs.text:
Status Code: 200 OK

{
    "download_url": "/api/static/reports/payroll_items_9Lpptvp3gGM_1765218985.zip",
    "password": "NVBYYEDM",
    "template": "payroll_items"
}

docs.title: Error Response
docs.text:
Status Code: 200 OK (with error field)

{
  "error": "Unknown report type: invalid_report"
}
